_note: Object/prop art-keys that have a PNG at assets/objects/<key>.png. Resources route on species: Woodcutting tries <resKey> (tree_oak, tree_willow, …) then 'tree'; Mining tries <resKey> (rock_copper, rock_iron, …) then 'ore'; structures use the propKind vocabulary. Optional 'scales':{key:mult} draws a kind bigger/smaller. Empty = procedural. See docs/OBJECT_ART_SPEC.md.
